roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, payment callbacks, report outbox and Durable Object live usage engine
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer miniapps and imported-subscription lifecycle
roles.processor: optional advanced schedules, backups, campaigns and background reports

core: LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR -> class LiveUsageCoordinator (required for cron-free live usage)

features: per-service automatic renewal from customer wallet with idempotent renewal runs
automatic low-balance alert and prepared recharge recommendation for representatives
smart plan recommendation, dynamic upsell, favorite plan and one-tap repurchase
abandoned-cart and win-back automation, gift service purchases, gift codes and loyalty points
service health snapshots, optional automatic failover queue and plan guarantee claims
QR subscription import using an optional QR decoder endpoint
edge-first staged updates, rollout records, error center and repair-all workflow
existing Plisio, CubePay, live usage, topic reports and PasarGuard compatibility are preserved

deployment.migration_tag: v3.1.9-live-usage (unchanged; no new Durable Object migration)
deployment.automatic_provisioning: supported when cf_account_id, cf_api_token and cf_worker_name are already saved and the token can update Workers scripts
deployment.activation: deploy core, edge and processor; the existing LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR binding and alarm state are reused
deployment.cron: the existing 10-minute central cron can remain; it is not used for live usage while the Durable Object binding is active

validation.auto_renew_exactly_once_claim: passed; first claim accepted, duplicate claim rejected

limitations: representative low-balance automation sends a deduplicated alert and prepared recharge recommendation; it does not charge a bank card without a payment mandate
QR subscription import is optional and sends the selected QR image to the external qrserver decoder endpoint
staged deployment verifies Edge before Core and records failures, but cannot restore previous Worker bytes unless a previous artifact is supplied
automatic failover changes PasarGuard user group_ids after three consecutive API health failures and must be explicitly enabled by the reseller
